name: Garter Snake
description: A huge neutral creature that roams open park spaces and can shift from environmental presence to serious threat the moment you provoke it. Its size alone changes how the space feels whenever it is nearby.
behavior: It patrols broad routes and uses its body and reach to control a lot of ground without moving in a hurry. Rather than chasing through speed, it commands respect by forcing constant repositioning.
interactionWithPlayer: It does not always start the fight on its own, but once hostile it punishes hard at close and mid range. The usual mistake is treating it as if it were only large, when in reality it also steals a lot of usable space.
interactionWithCreatures: Its size lets it dominate smaller creatures with very little effort. Even outside of direct combat, its movement alone makes nearby smaller bugs feel out of place around it.
strategy: Respect its reach, do not block late, and wait for the windows that open after its longer actions. This is not a fight won by constant aggression, but by understanding exactly when to step in and when to simply give ground.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A quick basic attack at close range.
